title: SubjectFilter
description:
Filter passed to `subject/list`.

All fields are optional and combined with AND semantics. Empty `Vec`
fields mean "no constraint on this dimension". `cursor` is opaque to the
daemon — backends issue and accept their own pagination tokens.

assignee.description: Match subjects assigned to one of these identifiers.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by a prior `subject/list` call.

kind.description: Match subjects whose `kind` is one of these.

labels_all.description: Match subjects that have all of these labels.

labels_any.description: Match subjects that have at least one of these labels.

limit.description: Suggested page size. Backends are free to clamp this.

status.description: Match subjects whose status is one of these.

updated_since.description: Match subjects updated at or after this timestamp.

SubjectStatus.description:
Normalized cross-backend subject status.

Backend-native states (`"Backlog"`, `"In Review"`, `"Won't Fix"`, ...) map
into one of these five via the `status_map` declared per-subject in
workflow YAML. The mapping lives in configuration, not code, so adding a
new backend never requires extending this enum.

oneOf.description:
Currently being worked by a workflow run (or by a human, in the
upstream system).
